preflight_full_dataset_nw2.note: +4.67 pp util and -0.16 s/step vs grid cell C at nw=4. num_workers=2 baked into flags above as a result.

verdict_reason: USER OVERRIDE 2026-04-10: measured mean_gpu_util 45.67% (pre-flight on full dataset with nw=2) is below the 55% acceptable floor. User reviewed io_remediation_report.md + logs/phase3-vram-preflight-cellC-nw2.md and chose Option 6 (accept degraded throughput) to unblock Plan 03-03 and downstream phases 4/4.1/5/6. Expected wall-clock: ~65K steps/epoch * 1.85 s/step * 2 epochs = ~66 hours if both epochs complete, less if early stopping triggers. Bottleneck is CPU-bound audio decode, not filesystem I/O - fix-forward path is a follow-up plan to pre-decode to WebDataset shards (expected 3-5x throughput). Audit trail: commits 529ae38 (pre-flight + diagnosis), 6e21867 (remediation report), d99045c (grid).
